Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Paga Settlement; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFFS ARRIO CHE, ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, AS A PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERAL, AND CALVIN RIVERA's Motion To Approve Paga Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to approve the PAGA settlement is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
